description: Led technical program management across five Nanodegree programs at Udacity, overseeing mentors and reviewers, user-testing course materials, and contributing curriculum feedback.
achievements: Led technical program management for 5 Nanodegree programs, overseeing mentors and reviewers and feeding curriculum insights back to the content team.
Doubled student graduation rates by leading scalable techniques that delivered more personalized support compared to the control group.
Reviewed code and project submissions for 150+ students across the Full Stack, Front-End, and JavaScript Nanodegree programs.
Leveraged JIRA structure formulas to power dashboards and reports, encouraging data-driven decision making across the org.
Mentored students on technical skills and career growth alongside code review responsibilities.
